items.name: apple/container
items.description: A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.
items.description_zh: 一种在 Mac 上使用轻量级虚拟机创建和运行 Linux 容器的工具。它是用 Swift 编写的，并针对 Apple 芯片进行了优化。

items.name: NVIDIA/SkillSpector
items.description: Security scanner for AI agent skills. Detect vulnerabilities, malicious patterns, and security risks.
items.description_zh: AI 代理技能的安全扫描器。检测漏洞、恶意模式和安全风险。

items.name: phuryn/pm-skills
items.description: PM Skills Marketplace: 100+ agentic skills, commands, and plugins — from discovery to strategy, execution, launch, and growth.
items.description_zh: PM 技能市场：100 多种代理技能、命令和插件 - 从发现到策略、执行、启动和增长。

items.name: addyosmani/agent-skills
items.description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.
items.description_zh: AI 编码代理的生产级工程技能。

items.name: iptv-org/iptv
items.description: Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world
items.description_zh: 来自世界各地的公开 IPTV 频道集合

items.name: mvanhorn/last30days-skill
items.description: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary
items.description_zh: AI 代理技能可研究 Reddit、X、YouTube、HN、Polymarket 和网络上的任何主题，然后综合得出有根据的摘要

items.name: chopratejas/headroom
items.description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.
items.description_zh: 在工具输出、日志、文件和 RAG 块到达 LLM 之前对其进行压缩。减少 60-95% 的标记，答案相同。库、代理、MCP 服务器。

items.name: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
items.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.
items.description_zh: 让您的人工智能代理有一双能够看到整个互联网的眼睛。阅读和搜索 Twitter、Reddit、YouTube、GitHub、Bilibili、小红书 — 一个 CLI，零 API 费用。

items.name: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
items.description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
items.description_zh: 从 Anthropic 中提取的系统提示 - Claude Fable 5、Opus 4.8、Claude Code、Claude Design。 OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 思维、GPT 5.5 即时、Codex。 Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash、3.1 Pro、反重力。 xAI - Grok、Cursor、Copilot、VS Code、Perplexity 等。定期更新。

items.name: music-assistant/server
items.description: Music Assistant is a free, opensource Media library manager that connects to your streaming services and a wide range of connected speakers. The server is the beating heart, the core of Music Assistant and must run on an always-on device like a Raspberry Pi, a NAS or an Intel NUC or alike.
items.description_zh: 音乐助手是一款免费的开源媒体库管理器，可连接到您的流媒体服务和各种连接的扬声器。服务器是跳动的心脏，是音乐助手的核心，必须在始终在线的设备上运行，例如 Raspberry Pi、NAS 或 Intel NUC 等。

items.name: refactoringhq/tolaria
items.description: Desktop app to manage markdown knowledge bases
items.description_zh: 用于管理 Markdown 知识库的桌面应用程序

items.name: lfnovo/open-notebook
items.description: An Open Source implementation of Notebook LM with more flexibility and features
items.description_zh: Notebook LM 的开源实现，具有更多灵活性和功能

items.name: microsoft/PowerToys
items.description: Microsoft PowerToys is a collection of utilities that supercharge productivity and customization on Windows
items.description_zh: Microsoft PowerToys 是一系列实用程序，可提高 Windows 上的工作效率和自定义功能

items.name: meshery/meshery
items.description: Meshery, the cloud native manager
items.description_zh: Meshery，云原生管理器

items.name: mattermost/mattermost
items.description: Mattermost is an open source platform for secure collaboration across the entire software development lifecycle..
items.description_zh: Mattermost 是一个开源平台，用于在整个软件开发生命周期中进行安全协作。

items.name: chatwoot/chatwoot
items.description: Open-source live-chat, email support, omni-channel desk. An alternative to Intercom, Zendesk, Salesforce Service Cloud etc. 🔥💬
items.description_zh: 开源实时聊天、电子邮件支持、全渠道服务台。 Intercom、Zendesk、Salesforce Service Cloud 等的替代品。🔥💬

items.name: LMCache/LMCache
items.description: LMCache: Supercharge Your LLM with the Fastest KV Cache Layer
items.description_zh: LMCache：用最快的 KV 缓存层增强您的 LLM

items.name: ml-explore/mlx
items.description: MLX: An array framework for Apple silicon
items.description_zh: MLX：Apple 芯片的阵列框架

items.name: pytest-dev/pytest
items.description: The pytest framework makes it easy to write small tests, yet scales to support complex functional testing
items.description_zh: pytest 框架可以轻松编写小型测试，并可扩展以支持复杂的功能测试

items.name: x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools
items.description: FULL Augment Code, Claude Code, Cluely, CodeBuddy, Comet, Cursor, Devin AI, Junie, Kiro, Leap.new, Lovable, Manus, NotionAI, Orchids.app, Perplexity, Poke, Qoder, Replit, Same.dev, Trae, Traycer AI, VSCode Agent, Warp.dev, Windsurf, Xcode, Z.ai Code, Dia & v0. (And other Open Sourced) System Prompts, Internal Tools & AI Models
items.description_zh: 完整增强代码、Claude Code、Cluely、CodeBuddy、Comet、Cursor、Devin AI、Junie、Kiro、Leap.new、Lovable、Manus、NotionAI、Orchids.app、Perplexity、Poke、Qoder、Replit、Same.dev、Trae、Traycer AI、VSCode Agent、Warp.dev、Windsurf、Xcode、Z.ai Code、Dia 和 v0。 （和其他开源）系统提示、内部工具和人工智能模型
